summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InventoryV2 page. Fixed 2 critical endpoint mismatch bugs and 1 backend KeyError bug. All features working correctly after fixes.

fixed_bugs.issue: KeyError: 'product_sku' when batches don't have product_sku field
fixed_bugs.fix: Added null check for product_sku in server.py line 1999-2017

fixed_bugs.issue: POST /api/batches endpoint mismatch - frontend called wrong endpoint
GET /api/stock/movements endpoint mismatch - frontend called wrong endpoint

passed_tests: Summary Cards: Critical (8), Warning (1), Healthy (6) counts displayed correctly
GET /api/inventory: Returns properly sorted and paginated data (200 OK)
Severity Sorting: Critical items appear first, then Warning, then Healthy
Pagination: Previous/Next buttons work correctly (disabled when only 1 page)
Search: Filtering by product name, SKU, brand works correctly
Product Expansion: Clicking row expands to show batch details
Add Batch Dialog: Opens correctly with all required fields
Add Batch Submit: Successfully creates batch with toast confirmation
Adjust Stock Dialog: Opens with correct batch info and Add/Remove options
Stock Movement History: Shows movement history with type, qty change, reason
Excel Upload button: Shows placeholder toast message
Export button: Shows placeholder toast message
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Form submission canceled because the form is not connected' - appears when closing dialogs, minor issue
Excel Upload and Export buttons are UI placeholders only - no backend implementation yet (as documented)

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 11 API tests passed after fixes

seed_data_creation: Created test batch BATCH_UI_TEST for Combiflam product
context_for_next_testing_agent: InventoryV2 page is fully functional. All CRUD operations for batches work. Stock adjustment and movement history features work. Excel Upload/Export are UI placeholders. Test user testadmin@pharmacy.com/admin123 can be used for testing.
